thought: Use @0045.jpg as the hard first-frame lock to preserve the existing mid-battle side-view composition, left-to-right engagement, top UI placement, and round-4 state. The sequence should not restart combat; it must begin by resolving the already visible floating damage and status state, then naturally advance into the next turn. To blend the scraped gameplay reference, adopt its fixed camera, short anticipation, effect-driven hit delivery, enemy-side recoil pause, bright crit-number payoff, and fast recovery rhythm instead of large cinematic movement. The hero remains mostly anchored on the left-center with restrained sprite motion, while impact is expressed through ink-gold slash VFX, shield ripple, hit-stop, floating numbers, and status/UI refresh. I selected only essential assets under the 9-file limit: one first frame, one motion reference video, one battle lock/layout asset, one hero ultimate sheet, one enemy hit reaction sheet, one ultimate VFX sheet, one floating damage/status UI sheet, one spirit beast assist sheet, and one top HP/UI feedback asset. This keeps character consistency, turn-based readability, Chinese ink-wash style, and strong physics feedback without deforming anatomy or breaking the original game logic.
prompt_en: First Frame: @0045.jpg. Reference Video: @trimmed_best_ref_1774784008.mp4. Motion Style Reference: strictly inherit the scraped gameplay rhythm of fixed side-view camera, short anticipation, effect-driven strike delivery, enemy recoil pause, explosive crit-number payoff, and fast turn-resolution recovery, while preserving the exact mid-battle round-4 layout from @0045.jpg and @first_frame_battle_lock_193414.png. Chinese ink wash painting style, traditional oriental aesthetics, flat illustration, cutout animation vibe, minimalist misty mountain battlefield with faded bamboo-cloud background, ink black, rice paper white, muted earth tones, exaggerated gold accents, side warm diffuse light with soft ink glow, 4K ultra HD, cinematic texture, rich details, no jitter, stable face without deformation, clear facial features, normal anatomical structure, natural proportions, non-stiff movement. [00s-01s] (Background Layer) Keep the original battle screen composition unchanged, side-view combat screen with slight elevated perspective, misty mountains and cliff foreground remain faded and static, only subtle ink fog drift. (Character/Action Layer) All units hold their current left-versus-right formation from round 4; the center-left white-haired cultivator hero stays anchored with a restrained ready pose using @hero_ultimate_sprite_sheet_193458.png, spirit beast hovers slightly behind using @spirit_beast_assist_sheet_193806.png, right-side winged enemies remain in place. (UI Layer) Start by resolving the exact captured state: the existing floating damage text near middle-left from @floating_damage_and_status_ui_193721.png gently fades upward, active buff and debuff icons tick once, top HP feedback and turn UI from @tree_hp_feedback_ui_181408.png update subtly, confirming continuation instead of restart. [01s-02.2s] (Character/Action Layer) Following the timing of @trimmed_best_ref_1774784008.mp4, the center-left hero performs a short ultimate wind-up with very small body displacement, robe and sleeve snap slightly, weapon arm draws back then releases in one clean decisive motion, preserving the side-scroll axis. The spirit beast assist briefly flares in sync behind the hero, adding a compact support pulse rather than a separate scene cut. (VFX Layer) Ink-gold energy gathers in a compressed crescent around the weapon using @ultimate_vfx_sheet_193633.png, then launches left-to-right as a bold ink slash trail with golden edge highlights. [02.2s-03.4s] (Character/Action Layer) A right-side bird enemy is struck first and enters a clear recoil reaction from @enemy_hit_reaction_sheet_193542.png: head snaps back, torso jerks backward, wings twitch open, body staggers in place with turn-based limited displacement, nearby enemies shake lightly from the transmitted force. (VFX Layer) At impact, create a bright flash peak, circular shield ripple, shockwave ring, ink particle dissipation, and a brief hit-stop frame, then a compact screen shake only on the impact beat; kinetic energy release should read through VFX rather than large character travel. (UI Layer) Large bold critical damage numbers and a short status proc burst from @floating_damage_and_status_ui_193721.png explode at center-right in gold and red, with HP dropping visibly on the affected target via @tree_hp_feedback_ui_181408.png. [03.4s-04.5s] (Character/Action Layer) The spirit beast completes a follow-up assist pulse from @spirit_beast_assist_sheet_193806.png, reinforcing the ultimate with one extra contained burst toward the same enemy cluster; the hero settles back into combat stance without over-animation. Enemies finish recoil and hold a brief stunned pause. (VFX Layer) Add a second lighter ink-gold aftershock, trailing sparks, and dissolving brushstroke fragments; keep effects layered above characters but below top HUD. (UI Layer) One more smaller damage tick and status refresh appear, buff or debuff icons reorder cleanly, floating text rises and fades quickly. [04.5s-05.5s] (Background Layer) Return the battlefield to calm idle motion with no camera move, maintaining the original anchors and side-view layout. (Character/Action Layer) All surviving units return to idle combat poses in the same formation, ready for the next unit in round 4. (UI Layer) Turn queue and HP bars settle, lingering crit text disappears, status icons refresh once, clearly signaling the end of this ultimate resolution and immediate continuation of turn-based combat. Emphasize authentic mobile RPG battle readability, snappy stop-motion-like timing, strong ink slash effects, fixed camera, and natural physics feedback, never cinematic 3D, never photorealistic.
prompt_zh: > 首帧锁定: @0045.jpg。参考视频: @trimmed_best_ref_1774784008.mp4。动作风格参考: 严格继承实机参考中的固定侧视镜头、短前摇、以特效承担打击表现、受击停顿、暴击数字冲屏、快速结算回归站位的节奏，同时保持 @0045.jpg 与 @first_frame_battle_lock_193414.png 中已经存在的第4回合战斗构图与左右对峙状态不变。中国水墨画风，传统东方审美，平面插画与剪纸/皮影式动势，极简雾山战场背景，水墨黑、宣纸白、低饱和土色、金色点缀，柔和侧向散射光与淡淡墨气辉光，4K超清，电影质感，细节丰富，画面稳定无抖动，人物面部稳定不变形，五官清晰，结构正常，比例自然，动作不僵硬。 [00s-01s] （Background Layer）保持首帧战斗界面构图完全不变，侧视战斗屏幕与轻微俯视角不改变，远处雾山、近景山崖与云气保持淡化处理，仅有轻微水墨雾气流动。 （Character/Action Layer）所有单位保持第4回合当前左右站位；左侧中部白发修士主角依据 @hero_ultimate_sprite_sheet_193458.png 保持克制的蓄势姿态，灵兽依据 @spirit_beast_assist_sheet_193806.png 悬浮在其后方略偏上位置，右侧飞禽敌人原地待命。 （UI Layer）先结算首帧中已出现的信息：使用 @floating_damage_and_status_ui_193721.png 让画面中央偏左已有飘字缓慢上浮并淡出，增益/减益图标跳动一次，顶部血量与回合信息依据 @tree_hp_feedback_ui_181408.png 轻微刷新，明确这是从当前瞬间继续推进，而不是重新开场。 [01s-02.2s] （Character/Action Layer）按照 @trimmed_best_ref_1774784008.mp4 的节奏，左侧中部主角进行一个很短的大招前摇，角色本体位移极小，只表现袖摆、袍角与持武器手臂的收势与瞬间释放，严格遵守左向右攻击轴线。灵兽在主角后方同步亮起一次辅助脉冲，不切镜，不脱离原站位。 （VFX Layer）利用 @ultimate_vfx_sheet_193633.png 在主角武器周围凝聚压缩的水墨金边能量弧，随后向右侧打出一道浓重的墨金斩击轨迹。 [02.2s-03.4s] （Character/Action Layer）右侧一只飞禽敌人首先中招，依据 @enemy_hit_reaction_sheet_193542.png 出现明确受力反馈：头部猛然后仰，躯干向后顿挫，双翼被冲击带开，身体原地踉跄式后坐，附近敌人受到连带震动但不大幅移位。 （VFX Layer）命中瞬间叠加亮度峰值、护盾波纹、圆形冲击波、墨粒炸散与极短受击定格，再加一次轻微震屏；力量感主要通过特效、停顿和反馈表达，而不是角色大位移。 （UI Layer）使用 @floating_damage_and_status_ui_193721.png 在画面中右区域爆出醒目的金红色“暴击”与大额伤害数字，同时通过 @tree_hp_feedback_ui_181408.png 让目标血条明显下降。 [03.4s-04.5s] （Character/Action Layer）灵兽依据 @spirit_beast_assist_sheet_193806.png 完成一次简洁的追击辅助，对同一敌方区域补上一记收束型脉冲；主角迅速收招并回到原本战斗姿态，不过度表演。敌人完成后仰与僵直，短暂停顿。 （VFX Layer）补充一道较轻的墨金余震、飞散火花与笔触碎片消散效果，特效层位于角色之上、顶部HUD之下。 （UI Layer）再出现一次较小的伤害跳字与状态刷新，增减益图标重新整理，飘字快速上浮并消失。 [04.5s-05.5s] （Background Layer）战场回到稳定待机状态，不移动镜头，不改变首帧锚点与侧视布局。 （Character/Action Layer）所有存活单位回到原左右阵型中的待机动作，准备第4回合下一单位行动。 （UI Layer）行动队列与血条稳定收束，残留暴击文字消失，状态图标刷新一次，清楚表现这段大招只是当前回合中的一次结算高潮，并自然衔接后续回合制战斗。整体强调手游回合制可读性、干脆利落的定格感节奏、夸张墨金刀光与真实受力反馈，绝不做写实3D或影视化大镜头。
